functional_requirements.description: User can create account using email and password.

validations.description: Email uniqueness must be validated before account creation.
Password length must be at least 8 characters.

risks.description: Email uniqueness check may fail if not properly implemented, leading to duplicate accounts.
Password length validation may be bypassed if client-side only, leading to weak passwords.

missing_information: No confirmation or verification step for email is specified.
No password complexity rules beyond minimum length (e.g., uppercase, special characters).
No error handling or messaging requirements for validation failures.
No specification of whether email format validation is required.
No details on account creation flow (e.g., immediate creation vs. email verification).

requirement_items.description: User can create account using email and password.
Email uniqueness must be validated before account creation.
Password length must be at least 8 characters.
